name: Tasty Tahini Dressing
recipeInstructions: Tahini, also called sesame paste, is available at natural food stores. This dressing is nice on fish, poultry, tofu, omelets, or salads. Blend all ingredients together with a wire whisk until smooth. Makes about 1/2 cup. Food Exchange per serving: 1/2 FAT EXCHANGES; CAL: 27; CHO: 0g; CAR: 1g; PRO: 1g; SOD: 1mg; FAT: 2g.
